content: By integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms into the Self-Refine framework's iterative self-feedback loop, we can create a multi-perspective self-refinement approach that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of no extra training or supervision while resolving the common blind spot that single-perspective self-feedback fails to catch. This hybrid framework lets an LLM challenge its own initial output from incompatible angles of reasoning, rather than just polishing an output rooted in its original perspective.
